titleZh: 中静实业（集团）有限公司诉上海电力实业有限公司等股权转让纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Zhongjing Industrial (Group) Co., Ltd. v. Shanghai Electric Power Industrial Co., Ltd. et al.
citation: 公报案例：股东优先购买权
holdingZh: 在国有产权通过产权交易场所公开转让的情形下，股东优先购买权中的“同等条件”既包括价格等实体条件，也包括进场摘牌、缴纳保证金等程序条件。老股东如拒绝依交易规则参与场内交易，人民法院不支持其绕开交易程序直接主张受让股权。
holdingEn: Where state-owned equity is publicly transferred through an exchange venue, the "same terms" requirement for shareholder pre-emption includes both substantive conditions such as price and procedural conditions such as entering the exchange process and posting the required deposit. A shareholder who refuses to participate under the exchange rules cannot bypass that process and compel a direct transfer through litigation.
